---
title: "synthetic_target.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\synthetic_target.py"
loc: 26
complexity: 2
logic_score: 7.40
style_score: 4.09
intel_score: 4.48
overall_score: 4.31
---

## Intent
The `synthetic_target.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on square. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via square. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
- `square`
